milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.11 — 3-row stacked content column. Layout flips to the user's preferred vertical order: row 1 holds the status cluster (duration + state) right-aligned, row 2 holds the eyebrow/category ('Course · Academy'), row 3 holds the title (bumped to 16px / 600 weight — the prominent bottom-row visual anchor). Subsequent optional rows (flags / coverage / progress) stack below as before. Grid simplifies from 3 columns to 2 (grab + content); trailing cluster is now inside the content column rather than its own rightmost track, so it justify-self: end within its row. No more title-vs-status horizontal competition — title always has the full content width. Drag-to-reorder within the Learn list ships next in M9.19a.12 (per user directive 'allow the ability to sort these items in the list by drag and drop if possible').
